person.name: Henry Knyveton

memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Knifton, Kniveton, Knyveton, Nifton, Knyvet, Knyveton and many more. First found in Derbyshire where they held a family seat from ancient times. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: John Kniveton settled in Virginia in 1738 (he also spelled his name Knifton). (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009) Motto Translated: I trust in the Lord. Recorded as Knifton, Kniveton, Knyfton, Knyveton, and others, this is an English surname of great antiquity. It originates from the village of Kniveton, given as being a parish in the county of Derbyshire, near the town of Ashbourne. The name means 'The settlement (tun) of Cenigifu', the latter being a fairly popular Old English female name which occurs in several places. These include Knayton in the county of North Yorkshire and Kneeton in Nottinghamshire. As we know from the exploits of Queen Boadacia, the 'ladies' were far from backward in coming forward. It may even be that their initial success against the all-conquering Roman army, was to lead to the later restriction on the roll of women in society, particularly outside of the home. This surname is first recorded in the Curia Regis rolls of the twentieth year of the reign of King Edward 3rd (1327 - 1377) when John de Knyveton is given as being a substantial landowner in the county of Derbyshire, and lord of the manor of Kniveton. Later recordings include Gilbert Kniveton in the register of students at Oxford University in 1605, and Thomas Knifton who married Katherine Swetbury at Prestbury in Cheshire, in 1633.  Copyright: Name Origin Research www.surnamedb.com 1980 - 2014.

burialPlace.address: Ashbourne, Derbyshire Dales District, Derbyshire, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Henry Kniveton, Esq. of Bradley, was the son of Henry Kniveton of Bradley and Joan.

«b»Marriage«/b»
He married Elizabeth Bagot. She was the daughter of Sir John Bagott of Blithfield and Beatrix, dau. of John Villiers.

«b»Henry and Elizabeth are the parents of:«/b»
1.) William (d. 1482)

2.) Richard, Esq. of Bradley m. Helen.

3.) Thomas.

4.) Elizabeth

5.) Jane.

sourceList.title: Henry Kniveton, "England, Derbyshire, Church of England Parish Registers, 1537-1918"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Knyveton於1405年出生在英國德比夏爾布拉德利時，他的父親Henry Kniveton39歲，母親Joan35歲。他和Elizabeth Bagot至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1468年在英國英格蘭賀福爾洛--也享年64歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Knyveton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kniveton (Derbys) or Kneeton (Notts).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Knyveton was born in 1405, in Bradley, Derbyshire, England, his father, Henry Kniveton, was 39 and his mother, Joan, was 35. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Bagot. He died about 1468, in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Knyveton est né en 1405, à Bradley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Kniveton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Bagot. Il est décédé environ 1468, à Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Knyveton 1405 in Bradley, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Kniveton 39 und seine Mutter Joan 35. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Bagot mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1468 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Knyveton è nato il nel 1405 nel Bradley, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Kniveton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Bagot. Morì circa 1468, nel Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Knyvetonが1405年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブラドリーで生まれた時，父Henry Knivetonは39歳，母Joanは35歳であった。彼はElizabeth Bagotとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1468年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアロス-オン-ウイで64歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Knyveton(이)가 1405년 영국 더비실르 브래들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Kniveton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Bagot(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 로스--w예에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Knyveton nasceu em 1405, em Bradley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Kniveton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Elizabeth Bagot. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1468, em Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Knyveton родился в 1405 г. в местности брадли, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Kniveton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 35. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Bagot. Он умер около 1468 г. в местности росс-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Knyveton nació en 1405, en Bradley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Kniveton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Elizabeth Bagot. Murió aproximadamente 1468, en Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
